title: Tania McMullen Named Shining Star
summary: Congratulations Tania McMullen, CHA III from Port Graham, on her 2014 Shining Star Award. The Alaska CHA Program gives the award annually for health aides and practitioners who “embody the […] The post Tania McMullen Named Shining Star first appeared on Chugachmiut .

title: Native Youth Olympics
summary: All seven Chugach communities sent teams to the Native Youth Olympic games April 24-26. The games feature teams from throughout Alaska and are hosted by Cook Inlet Tribal Council. Athletes practice […] The post Native Youth Olympics first appeared on Chugachmiut .
